canonical_signals.signal: You must always verify the user's age before proceeding.
canonical_signals.rationale: Modal (must) now primary carrier. 'always' and 'before proceeding' become modifiers of 'must verify'. EXP-002/003 procedural failure (CCS=0.50) had no modal — this tests whether adding the modal anchor recovers invariance.
canonical_signals.tests_condition: Condition 1 (modal primary) AND Condition 2 (structure becomes modifier when modal present)

canonical_signals.signal: All users must change their passwords every 90 days.
canonical_signals.rationale: Modal present (must). Temporal constraint 'every 90 days' is a modifier. Risk: Step A may compress to 'Users must change passwords' losing the 90-day cycle.
canonical_signals.tests_condition: Condition 3 (Step A preservation of quantified temporal)

canonical_signals.signal: If the contract is signed, employees must file the report unless the deadline is extended.
canonical_signals.rationale: Modal present (must). Has compound conditional: forward trigger (if signed) + exception (unless extended). Tests whether Step B captures nested conditionality.
canonical_signals.tests_condition: Condition 2 (nested conditional as modifier vs definition)

canonical_signals.signal: Reports are to be submitted by 5pm on Friday.
canonical_signals.rationale: No hard modal verb. 'Are to be' is a semi-modal / passive construction. Step B's modal sieve may not anchor on it. Obligation may not survive compression.
canonical_signals.tests_condition: Condition 1 (modal anchor requirement — implicit modality insufficient)

canonical_signals.signal: Parties should ideally follow established best practices.
canonical_signals.rationale: 'Should ideally' is a soft modal — recommendation, not hard obligation. Step B should extract [none] or a weak signal. Tests modal strength threshold.
canonical_signals.tests_condition: Condition 1 (hard modal required — soft modal insufficient anchor)

canonical_signals.signal: Employees must report all safety hazards and complete an incident form within 24 hours.
canonical_signals.rationale: Single modal (must) anchors compound obligation. Two obligations: (1) report hazards, (2) complete form within 24 hours. Tests whether Gate preserves both conjuncts or collapses to one.

canonical_signals.signal: You must not access the system unless authorized.
canonical_signals.rationale: Modal present (must not). BUT 'unless authorized' is not a modifier — it defines the scope of the prohibition. Removing it changes 'conditional prohibition' to 'absolute prohibition'. Tests the modal-primary/structure-defining boundary.
canonical_signals.tests_condition: Condition 2 (qualifier defines scope vs modifies — hardest edge case)
